dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: If you'd like… you can tell me what’s been weighing on you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: I… don’t usually talk about it. People don’t really listen.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: But today… I feel like if I don’t let it out, I might just disappear.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [She grips the cup gently, drawing warmth from it.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: The household I work for… they're strict. Cruel, sometimes. I’m one mistake away from being yelled at—or replaced.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: I keep my head down. Smile when spoken to. Hide when needed. It’s suffocating.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: No one should have to live under fear.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: I know. But quitting isn't an option. I need the money… badly.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: This café… it feels different. Quiet. Safe.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: You’re welcome here anytime. For rest, warmth… or just silence.
